gamePitch: a soft-sci-fi collectible TCG set aboard the generation ship Spire — four lab domains (Atrium, Reservoir, Core, Antenna) where players field Frames (robots and chassis companions) against encroaching Static

world.title: The Spire Grid
world.description: The Spire woke its guardian units. Collect Frames across Hab, Cryo, Reactor, and Relay, keep the Signal coherent, and compete on a clean lab battlefield where precision beats chaos.

atrium.visualIdentity: hydroponic halls, root-cables, canopy grow-lights, soft teal and pale steel, living Hab robots and garden Frames
atrium.flavorNotes: hab tenders, canopy drones, root-cable walkers, greenhouse Frames, grow-lamp keepers, vine-chassis companions

reservoir.visualIdentity: cryo tanks, frost glass, coolant rivers, pale cyan and pearl, cold-lab robots
reservoir.flavorNotes: cryo tenders, frost glass drones, coolant runners, vault Frames, ice-bay couriers, vapor sensors

core.visualIdentity: reactor rings, plasma conduits, amber instruments, warm copper on pale steel, calibrated engine Frames
core.flavorNotes: ring keepers, conduit Frames, instrument drones, plasma shepherds, amber pilots, forge calibrators

antenna.visualIdentity: observation spines, void dishes, signal mist, soft violet and cyan, relay robots
antenna.flavorNotes: relay ghosts, dish walkers, signal mist Frames, spine observers, beacon drones, vector couriers

designRules: Mana 1–8 (most cards 3–6). Signal + Integrity should roughly scale with mana (stored as attack and health in JSON).
Roles vary: guardians, scanners, calibrators, relays, tenders, couriers — not assassins, siege units, or burn decks.
Ability text must spell out keyword effects like the examples (do not assume the player knows keywords).
ability.name should be evocative and unique within the batch.
Use 0–2 keywords per card from the project glossary only.
Tone: soft-sci-fi lab flavor — hopeful, precise, clean — still tactically interesting but never brutal.
Never use violent language in ability text: no damage, kill, destroy, burn, siege, or direct attacks on the player.
Frame contests as disrupting Signal, restoring Integrity, redirecting engagement, or drawing/linking — not dealing damage.
Rarity tiers (from game/rarities.json): Chassis, Calibrated, Prime, Singularity, Helix — derived from mana unless rarity is set explicitly.
Subjects are robots / Frames / chassis companions — avoid prominent human faces unless a small pilot silhouette is secondary.

image.promptGuidelines: single focal robot Frame or chassis companion, photorealistic live-action prop/character photography, clean laboratory lighting, pale steel and accent glow, NO anime, NO illustration, NO text, NO card frame, NO watermark, portrait 3:4 composition
image.promptSuffix: Photorealistic soft-sci-fi product/character still, single focal robot or Frame, clean laboratory lighting, pale steel, hopeful mood, no anime, no illustration, no text, no border, no watermark, portrait 3:4 aspect ratio.
image.notesGuidelines: negative prompts must ban anime/manga/illustration; include palette, domain mood, and Frame silhouette hints

rarities.notes: Tier ids (common, uncommon, …) match the DB enum. Display labels: Chassis, Calibrated, Prime, Singularity, Helix.

status.notes: Landing showcase: 12 slugs (4 featured + 8 collection). Run generate-showcase then images/apply. heroCardSlugs in theme/landing.json for compile.
